Commander of the IRGC's Quds Force, Esmail Qaani, said that the interception and hijacking of the freedom flotillas by the “Zionist criminals” constitute a form of international terrorism.

He added that the efforts and mobilization of the flotillas seeking to break the blockade on Gaza and rescue Palestinian children and women reflect a growing global movement against “child-killing Zionists.” 

Qaani also stated that the actions carried out by "Israel" would only strengthen the determination of people around the world to continue efforts aimed at ending the siege on the people of Gaza.

#Iran #IRGC #FreedomFlotilla #Gaza #Palestine #AlMayadeen
#US oil giants #ExxonMobil and #Chevron are holding output steady despite pressure from Trump, as war-driven disruptions push oil to $126 and fuel prices above $4. https://t.co/iwOAfbkDyW
Iran is ...

Deputy Speaker of the Iranian Parliament, Ali Nikzad, outlined key points of Iran’s proposed plan for managing the Strait of Hormuz, presenting it as a major strategic shift in the region.

According to Nikzad, the proposal would bar Israeli-linked ships from passing through the waterway, while vessels from countries considered hostile would require transit permits tied to war reparations. He also stated that the new framework would be implemented in accordance with international law and the rights of neighboring states, while emphasizing that Iran “will not relinquish its rights.”

Nikzad further described the initiative as being as significant for Iran as the historic nationalization of the oil industry.

#Iran #WarOnIran #StraitOfHormuz #AlMayadeen

#WATCH | Footage circulating on social media shows Israeli occupation forces carrying out demolitions at the monastery and school of the Salvatorian Sisters in Yaroun, South Lebanon.

This attack on a religious site is not an isolated incident, but part of a long series of Israeli attacks on Christian and Muslim religious sites across the entire region, including historic churches and mosques.

Earlier in April, IOF soldiers destroyed a statue of Jesus in the southern Lebanese town of Debel, and also filmed themselves doing so, drawing widespread condemnation.

#Lebanon #SouthLebanon #AlMayadeen
